title: Welcome
body: All campaign missions are now available for deployment. Good luck out there, soldier.

title: Update 1.01
body: Addressed stability issues and improved menu navigation. Save system now operational across all modes.

title: Playlist Update
body: Team Deathmatch and Domination now available in core matchmaking rotation. Get your squad together.

title: Milestone
body: Thank you to our community for 10 million players worldwide. See you on the front lines.

title: Patchnotes
body: Weapon balance adjustments and performance improvements deployed across all modes. Full notes available online.

title: Double XP
body: Double XP weekend is active now through Monday. Rank up faster in all game modes.

title: Matchmaking
body: Party connection stability has been upgraded. Matchmaking improvements are now live on all servers.

title: Welcome Back
body: Check the barracks for your service record and recent accolades. New missions are waiting.

title: Hotfix
body: Resolved a rare crash when navigating the multiplayer lobby. Servers are back online.

title: Servers Online
body: All servers are operational. Squad up and dominate the leaderboards.
